# numberOfSlideshowItems()

**Instance Method**

Returns the number of items in a slideshow.

## Declaration

```swift
func numberOfSlideshowItems() -> Int
```

## Return Value

The number of items in the slideshow.

## Discussion

Your data source must implement this method.

## Providing Slideshow Information

- **slideshowItem(at:)**: Returns the item for a given index
- **nameOfSlideshowItem(at:)**: Returns the display name for item at the specified index.
- **canExportSlideshowItem(at:toApplication:)**: Reports whether the export button should be enabled for a slideshow item.

items.description: Returns the item for a given index
items.name: slideshowItem(at:)

items.description: Returns the display name for item at the specified index.
items.name: nameOfSlideshowItem(at:)

items.description: Reports whether the export button should be enabled for a slideshow item.
items.name: canExportSlideshowItem(at:toApplication:)
